design.title: GenAI Genesis Banner Design
design.subtitle: 2026 biggest ai hackathon !
design.details: based on our 2026 hackathon theme, ai in the city, i designed one of banners to use at the hackathon. a lot of pictures were taken with it which made me very happy to see :)

design.title: workshop graphics - utmist
design.subtitle: instagram templates
design.details: as a graphic design associate for utmist, i designed a lot of our key instagram posts to promote our events. this was one of the templates which i designed and was one of my best ones!

design.title: conference graphics - gdg utsc

design.details: as a part of marketing for gdg utsc, i designed a lot of our key instagram posts and design templates for our 'build with ai' event. this was one of our carousel posters we posted!
